<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Shivam – Digital Marketer</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    :root{
      --bg:#0d0d0d;--card:#161616;--border:#2a2a2a;
      --accent:#f5c842;--text:#f0f0f0;--muted:#888;
      --font:'Poppins',sans-serif;
    }
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
    body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:15px;line-height:1.6}

    /* NAV */
    nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:99;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:1rem 2.5rem;background:rgba(13,13,13,0.93);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .nav-logo{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)}
    .nav-links{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;list-style:none;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .nav-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;transition:color .2s}
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text)}

    /* HERO */
    .hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:5rem 2.5rem 3rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;gap:4rem}
    .hero-left{flex:1}
    .hero-number{font-size:4rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--border);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.5rem}
    .hero-sub{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:.5rem}
    .hero-name{font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,5.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:1rem}
    .hero-name span{color:var(--accent)}
    .hero-roles{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
    .role-tag{padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted)}
    .hero-desc{color:var(--muted);max-width:480px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1.8rem;font-size:.93rem}
    .hero-contact{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.5rem}
    .hero-contact a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;transition:color .2s}
    .hero-contact a:hover{color:var(--accent)}
    .photo-wrap{width:260px;height:340px;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid var(--border);position:relative;flex-shrink:0}
    .photo-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top}

    /* LAYOUT */
    section{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:5rem 2.5rem}
    .section-label{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.5rem}
    .section-title{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.5rem);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2.5rem;line-height:1.2}
    hr.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}

    /* ABOUT */
    .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start}
    .about-text p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:.8rem;font-size:.93rem}
    .about-text strong{color:var(--text)}
    .heart-line{color:var(--accent)!important}
    .journey-list{list-style:none;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
    .journey-list li{padding:.55rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}
    .journey-list li::before{content:"→";color:var(--accent)}
    .goal-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:1rem 1.2rem}
    .goal-box h4{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.4rem}
    .goal-box p{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted)}

    /* SKILLS */
    .skills-wrapper{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem}
    .skills-group-title{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1rem}
    .skill-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
    .skill-tag{padding:.4rem .9rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:.83rem;color:var(--text);transition:border-color .2s}
    .skill-tag:hover{border-color:var(--accent)}
    .tools-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:.75rem}
    .tool-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:1rem .8rem;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s}
    .tool-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text)}
    .tool-icon{font-size:1.5rem}

    /* SERVICES */
    .services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
    .service-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:1.5rem;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s}
    .service-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px)}
    .service-icon{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
    .service-card h3{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.5rem}
    .service-card p{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}

    /* CASE STUDY */
    .case-section{margin-bottom:4rem}
    .case-section-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
    .case-num-badge{background:var(--accent);color:#000;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;padding:.4rem .8rem;border-radius:6px}
    .case-section-header h3{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700}
    .case-body-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem}
    .case-info{}
    .case-meta-label{font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.4rem;margin-top:1rem}
    .case-meta-label:first-child{margin-top:0}
    .case-meta-val{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text);line-height:1.6}
    .case-meta-list{list-style:none;margin:0}
    .case-meta-list li{font-size:.87rem;color:var(--muted);padding:.2rem 0;display:flex;gap:.5rem}
    .case-meta-list li::before{content:"—";color:var(--border)}
    .case-result-val{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--text);font-weight:600;line-height:1.7}
    .case-imgs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.75rem}
    .case-img{width:100%;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);object-fit:cover}
    .case-img.single{grid-column:1/-1;max-height:320px;object-fit:contain;background:#111}

    /* CANVA GRID */
    .canva-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:1rem}
    .canva-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s}
    .canva-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px)}
    .canva-card img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;display:block}
    .canva-label{padding:.6rem .9rem;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

    /* RESULTS STRIP */
    .results-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
    .result-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;text-align:center}
    .result-big{font-size:3rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.4rem}
    .result-label{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted)}

    /* CONTACT */
    .contact-wrap{text-align:center;max-width:700px;margin:0 auto}
    .contact-wrap h2{font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem}
    .contact-wrap h2 span{color:var(--accent)}
    .contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin-top:2.5rem;max-width:440px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
    .contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:1.1rem 1.5rem;text-decoration:none;color:var(--text);font-size:.9rem;transition:border-color .2s}
    .contact-link:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
    .link-icon{font-size:1.1rem}
    .link-title{font-weight:600}
    .link-sub{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted)}

    footer{text-align:center;padding:2rem;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    footer span{color:var(--accent)}

    @media(max-width:768px){
      .hero{flex-direction:column-reverse;gap:2rem;padding-top:6rem}
      .photo-wrap{width:180px;height:240px}
      .about-grid,.skills-wrapper,.results-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .case-body-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .case-imgs{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      nav{padding:1rem}
      .nav-links{gap:1rem}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">S.</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#designs">Designs</a></li>
    <li><a href="#work">Case Studies</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-number">01</div>
    <div class="hero-sub">Hi, I'm</div>
    <div class="hero-name">Shivam<br/><span>.</span></div>
    <div class="hero-roles">
      <span class="role-tag">▸ Digital Marketer</span>
      <span class="role-tag">▸ Social Media Manager</span>
      <span class="role-tag">▸ SEO Strategist</span>
      <span class="role-tag">▸ GMB Expert</span>
    </div>
    <p class="hero-desc">Helping brands grow through organic reach, GMB optimization, SEO strategies & data-driven social media marketing.</p>
    <div class="hero-contact">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivam-singh-3120433b8" target="_blank">💼 linkedin.com/in/shivam-singh</a>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/_.shixxm_" target="_blank">📸 @_.shixxm_</a>
      <a href="mailto:shivamshi380@gmail.com">✉️ shivamshi380@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="tel:7827168449">📞 +91 7827168449</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="photo-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shivam"/>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-label">About Me</div>
  <div class="section-title">Who Am I?</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>I am an aspiring digital marketer from <strong>Delhi</strong>, passionate about helping brands grow through organic content and social media marketing.</p>
      <p>Alongside my <strong>B.Com studies (1st Year)</strong>, I work on real-world projects — growing Instagram accounts, running SEO blogs targeting US & Germany audiences, optimising Google Business profiles, and analysing data through Google Analytics.</p>
      <p>I enjoy combining <strong>creativity with AI tools</strong> and data-driven strategies to help businesses build a stronger online presence.</p>
      <p class="heart-line">💛 I believe in consistency, creativity, and adding real value through content.</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1rem">Worked On:</p>
      <ul class="journey-list">
        <li>Social Media Management</li>
        <li>SEO & Content Strategy</li>
        <li>Instagram Growth (0 to results)</li>
        <li>Google Business Profile (GMB)</li>
        <li>Blog Traffic via Organic Social</li>
        <li>AI-Powered Marketing</li>
        <li>Canva Graphic Design</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="goal-box">
        <h4>🎯 Goal</h4>
        <p>To become a full-stack digital marketer and help businesses scale through digital platforms.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-label">Skills & Tools</div>
  <div class="section-title">What I Know</div>
  <div class="skills-wrapper">
    <div>
      <div class="skills-group-title">Marketing Skills</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Social Media Marketing</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Content Strategy</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Instagram Growth</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">SEO & Keyword Research</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">On-Page SEO</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">GMB Optimization</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Local SEO</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Google Analytics</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Personal Branding</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Copywriting</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Reel Strategy</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Canva Design</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="skills-group-title">Tools I Use</div>
      <div class="tools-grid">
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">🎨</span>Canva</div>
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">🤖</span>ChatGPT</div>
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">📊</span>Google Analytics</div>
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">🔎</span>Search Console</div>
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">📍</span>Google My Business</div>
        <div class="tool-item"><span class="tool-icon">📱</span>Meta Suite</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="services">
  <div class="section-label">Services I Offer</div>
  <div class="section-title">How I Can Help</div>
  <div class="services-grid">
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">👥</div><h3>Social Media Management</h3><p>Managing complete Instagram presence & engagement strategy.</p></div>
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">✏️</div><h3>Content Creation</h3><p>Posts, carousels, stories, reels & creatives via Canva.</p></div>
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">📍</div><h3>GMB Optimization</h3><p>Google Business Profile setup, local SEO & ranking on Maps.</p></div>
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">🔍</div><h3>SEO Strategy</h3><p>Keyword research, on-page SEO, and blog traffic growth.</p></div>
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">💬</div><h3>Caption Writing</h3><p>Engaging, creative & conversion-focused captions.</p></div>
    <div class="service-card"><div class="service-icon">✨</div><h3>AI-Powered Marketing</h3><p>Using AI tools for content creation, research & productivity.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CANVA DESIGNS -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="designs">
  <div class="section-label">Canva Designs</div>
  <div class="section-title">Design Work</div>
  <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.8rem;line-height:1.7">Social media creatives, course posters & educational content designed for real clients using Canva.</p>
  <div class="canva-grid">
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Graphic Design Services"/><div class="canva-label">Graphic Design Services</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Digital Marketing — Personal Brand"/><div class="canva-label">Digital Marketing Guide</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Aspirants Space Digital Marketing"/><div class="canva-label">Aspirants Space — DM Course</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Computer Courses Poster"/><div class="canva-label">Computer Courses Poster</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Video Editing Course"/><div class="canva-label">Video Editing Course</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Top 5 High Paying Careers"/><div class="canva-label">Top 5 High Paying Careers</div></div>
    <div class="canva-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Summer Fashion"/><div class="canva-label">Summer Fashion Post</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CASE STUDIES -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="work">
  <div class="section-label">Case Studies</div>
  <div class="section-title">Work Done</div>

  <!-- CASE 1: Instagram @_.shixxm_ -->
  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-header">
      <span class="case-num-badge">CASE 01</span>
      <h3>Instagram Growth — @_.shixxm_</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body-grid">
      <div class="case-info">
        <div class="case-meta-label">Objective</div>
        <div class="case-meta-val">Grow Instagram account organically from scratch without paid ads, using Reels and cross-platform strategy.</div>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Work Done</div>
        <ul class="case-meta-list">
          <li>Reels content strategy & consistent posting</li>
          <li>Cross-promotion on X (Twitter) & Quora</li>
          <li>Audience engagement loops</li>
          <li>Profile optimization & bio setup</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Result</div>
        <div class="case-result-val">✅ 230K+ Views (90 days)<br/>✅ 144,822 Accounts Reached<br/>✅ +717.2% Reach Growth<br/>✅ 2,244 Followers<br/>✅ 97.3% Non-follower Reach</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="case-imgs">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="@_.shixxm_ profile" class="case-img"/>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="230K views screenshot" class="case-img"/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CASE 2: Instagram @shixm.vine -->
  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-header">
      <span class="case-num-badge">CASE 02</span>
      <h3>Instagram Growth — @shixm.vine</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body-grid">
      <div class="case-info">
        <div class="case-meta-label">Objective</div>
        <div class="case-meta-val">Build second Instagram page achieving consistent monthly views using viral Reels formats.</div>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Work Done</div>
        <ul class="case-meta-list">
          <li>Viral Reels format research & execution</li>
          <li>Niche content strategy</li>
          <li>Engagement & interaction</li>
          <li>Profile optimization</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Result</div>
        <div class="case-result-val">✅ 121,979 Accounts Reached<br/>✅ 26K Views/Month<br/>✅ 98.3% Non-follower Reach<br/>✅ 76K+ Reel Views</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="case-imgs">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="@shixm.vine profile" class="case-img"/>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="121K reach screenshot" class="case-img"/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CASE 3: Blogger SEO -->
  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-header">
      <span class="case-num-badge">CASE 03</span>
      <h3>SEO Blog — Digital Conceptt</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body-grid">
      <div class="case-info">
        <div class="case-meta-label">Objective</div>
        <div class="case-meta-val">Build a digital marketing blog targeting US & Germany audience through organic SEO and social traffic with zero paid promotion.</div>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Work Done</div>
        <ul class="case-meta-list">
          <li>40+ SEO blog articles written</li>
          <li>Keyword research & on-page optimization</li>
          <li>Facebook, LinkedIn & Instagram traffic</li>
          <li>Google Analytics tracking & optimization</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Result</div>
        <div class="case-result-val">✅ 378 Users · 449 Sessions<br/>✅ 1.34K Views (30 days)<br/>✅ 88% Organic Social Traffic<br/>✅ Top: US (625), Germany (115), India (232)<br/>✅ 1m 42s Avg Session Duration</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="case-imgs">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Blog views" class="case-img"/>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Blog locations" class="case-img"/>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Blog browsers" class="case-img" style="grid-column:1/-1"/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CASE 4: GMB -->
  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-header">
      <span class="case-num-badge">CASE 04</span>
      <h3>Google My Business — Ansh Studio, Delhi</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body-grid">
      <div class="case-info">
        <div class="case-meta-label">Objective</div>
        <div class="case-meta-val">Get a local photo studio listed and ranked on Google Maps for "Nearby Photo Studio" search in Vishwas Nagar, Delhi.</div>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Work Done</div>
        <ul class="case-meta-list">
          <li>Google Business Profile setup from scratch</li>
          <li>Profile optimization — photos, description, categories</li>
          <li>Local SEO implementation</li>
          <li>Completed in just 2 hours</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="case-meta-label">Result</div>
        <div class="case-result-val">✅ Ranked #8 on Google Maps<br/>✅ Keyword: "Nearby Photo Studio"<br/>✅ Location: Vishwas Nagar, Delhi<br/>✅ Achieved in only 2 Hours<br/>✅ 0 to Ranked — Completely Organic</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="case-imgs">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="GMB case study" class="case-img single"/>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="GMB rank result" class="case-img single"/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- RESULTS -->
<hr class="divider"/>
<section id="results">
  <div class="section-label">Key Numbers</div>
  <div class="section-title">Real Results</div>
  <div class="results-grid">
    <div class="result-card"><div class="result-big">230K+</div><div class="result-label">Instagram Views (90d)</div></div>
    <div class="result-card"><div class="result-big">+717%</div><div class="result-label">Accounts Reached Growth</div></div>
    <div class="result-card"><div class="result-big">#8</div><div class="result-label">Google Maps Rank (GMB)</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<hr class="divider"/>

  <div class="contact-wrap">
    <div class="section-label" style="text-align:center">Contact</div>
    <h2>Let's Work <span>Together!</span></h2>

        <div><div class="link-title">shivamshi380@gmail.com</div><div class="link-sub">Drop me a message anytime.</div></div>

    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:2.5rem;color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem">Thank You! ♡</p>

  </div>
</section>

</body>
